issue_title: map.on('draw.update', callback) does not fire consistently
issue_body_preview:
<!--
Hello! Thanks for contributing. 

If you are reporting a bug, please:
 - Make the issue title a succinct but specific description of the unexpected behavior. Bad: "Drawing line is broken". Good: "draw.changeMode('draw_line_string') throws an invalid options error"
 - Include a link to a mi
test_description_zh: 在地图上使用绑定 draw.update 事件的回调，绘制一个多边形或线段后，通过拖拽顶点或移动整个要素来编辑该图形，观察每次编辑操作完成后 draw.update 事件是否都能被触发。
expected_result_zh: 每次对已绘制的要素进行拖拽顶点、移动要素等编辑操作后，draw.update 事件回调都应稳定、一致地触发，不会出现某些编辑操作后事件未触发的情况。
